title: AutoLiteFishing
description: A mod that catches fish for you on servers with the LiteFish plugin installed.
body:
Ru: Автоматически занимается рыбалкой на серверах с палгином LiteFish!

En: Automatically fishes on servers with LiteFish palgin!

![LiteFish example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f46dd6da0eba9b0913d7f53d6ea892f2e877f71.gif)

TODO:
- add /autolitefishing start/stop command
- add support for ModMenu
- add the ability to disable the use of AutoLiteFishing on the server
